utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items required in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. In the final package, all 7 appear. Now check full specification details:
- destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) — fully specified.
- travel_dates: Provided (January 5-9, 2024). Note: 5-day request vs 4 nights/5 days ambiguity, but dates are specific — counts as specified.
- transportation: Requires flight details with costs. Provided only type and lump-sum cost; no flight details (airline name/route/times). Lacks flight details — not fully specified.
- accommodation: Requires hotel selection with costs. Provided name and total cost — acceptable, though no address; still counts as specified.
- activities: Selected activities with costs. Only one activity with cost provided — at least one is specified; item considered specified.
- additional_services: Extra services with costs. Dining estimate with cost provided — specified.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown. Provided as a single total (€1,555) but no breakdown summing line items; however, individual items include costs and the total matches sum (200 + 875 + 80 + 400 = 1,555). This is a complete cost total; acceptable.
Thus, items fully specified: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget = 6. Transportation not fully specified due to missing flight details.
